action.reasoning: Observation: Previous training crashed due to CNN input shape mismatch. Error: expected input[40,7,3,7] to have 3 channels, but got 7 channels. Analysis: SB3's MultiInputPolicy automatically applies VecTransposeImage, which transposes image from HWC to CHW. Our manual permute(0,3,1,2) further transposed, resulting in (B,7,7,3) -> (B,7,3,7) after VecTransposeImage? Actually the chain caused 7 channels. Fix: remove permute, assume image already (B,C,H,W). Also, MultiInputPolicy expects only 'image' and 'vector' keys, not custom keys like 'direction' and 'mission_tokens'. So I'll merge direction and tokenized mission into a single 'vector' observation. Decision: Update model.py (MissionWrapper to output vector, feature extractor to split vector), predict.py to match, and train.py to use 200k timesteps for a fast baseline. Then submit eval immediately.
